title: Heron's Head Park | SF Port
content: [Skip to main content](http://www.sfport.com/heronsheadpark#main). [![Image 1: Home](http://www.sfport.com/sites/default/files/styles/site_logo/public/sf-port-logo_0.png?itok=aK5KOacQ)SF Port](http://www.sfport.com/ "Home"). *   [Visit](http://www.sfport.com/visit). *   [Projects & Programs](http://www.sfport.com/projects-programs). *   [Maritime](http://www.sfport.com/maritime). *   [Services](http://www.sfport.com/services). *   [Leasing](http://www.sfport.com/leasing). *   [Calendar](http://www.sfport.com/calendar). *   [About](http://www.sfport.com/about). [Ferry Service](http://www.sfport.com/node/2902#ferry-service). 1.   [Home](http://www.sfport.com/). ![Image 2: Aerial of Heron's Head Park](http://www.sfport.com/sites/default/files/styles/media_image_default_1x/public/images/2021-09/SW_Heron%27s_Head.Aerial.jpeg?itok=ft3FMxCG). Heron Head’s Park is part of the [San Francisco Bay Trail](https://mtc.ca.gov/operations/regional-trails-parks/san-francisco-bay-trail).The trail extends across the park and crosses the Blue Greenway trail, Nature Play Area, and the EcoCenter. Grab your binoculars and download our[field guide to Heron’s Head](https://sfport.com/files/2022-09/100Birds_of_HeronsHeadPark.pdf). ![Image 3: View of Heron's Head Park trail](http://www.sfport.com/sites/default/files/styles/gallery/public/images/2024-03/dji_0243.jpg?itok=_YGbD-TD). ![Image 4: EcoCenter and the Heron's Head Park trailhead](http://www.sfport.com/sites/default/files/styles/gallery/public/images/2024-03/earth_day_ecocenter_2.jpg?itok=aZ3V3mdE). ![Image 5: EcoCenter](http://www.sfport.com/sites/default/files/styles/gallery/public/images/2024-03/982a2291.jpg?itok=DL5eWgrJ). title: Heron's Head Trail, California - 16 Reviews, Map - AllTrails
content: The park is a habitat for waterfowl and a well-known spot for birders, and the views of San Francisco Bay are spectacular. Parking is at the end of Cargo Way

title: The EcoCenter at Heron's Head Park
content: [Skip to Main Content](https://sfrecpark.org/1226/The-EcoCenter-at-Herons-Head-Park#cc51982c35-056e-49f1-9c5a-82bd529d00a6). *   [![Image 3: Facebook Opens in new window](https://sfrecpark.org/ImageRepository/Document?documentID=1078)](https://www.facebook.com/sfrecpark/). *   [![Image 5: YouTube Opens in new window](https://sfrecpark.org/ImageRepository/Document?documentID=1084)](https://www.youtube.com/user/sfRecPark). *   [![Image 6: Instagram Opens in new window](https://sfrecpark.org/ImageRepository/Document?documentID=1080)](https://www.instagram.com/sfrecpark/). 4.   [ABOUT US](https://sfrecpark.org/388/ABOUT-US). ![Image 8](https://sfrecpark.org/ImageRepository/Document?documentID=818). 3.   [The EcoCenter at Heron's Head Park](https://sfrecpark.org/1226/The-EcoCenter-at-Herons-Head-Park). ![Image 9: ecocenter 111](https://sfrecpark.org/ImageRepository/Document?documentId=7697)The EcoCenter located in Heron’s Head Park serves as a classroom for many local schools, community-based organizations, and government agencies. Beyond the classroom, the EcoCenter includes an outdoor [Nature Exploration Area](https://sfrecpark.org/Facilities/Facility/Details/Herons-Head-Park-Nature-Exploration-Area-447), winner of UNICEF’s 2021 Cities Inspires Award, for the safe, clean, sustainable, and child-friendly environments category. To learn more about rental guidelines and costs, please visit our [Permits & Reservations page](https://sfrecpark.org/1197/EcoCenter-at-Herons-Head-Park). To submit a request for a tour of the EcoCenter, please complete the [Tour Request Form](https://sfrecpark.org/FormCenter/Volunteer-Events-9/Herons-Head-Park-Eco-Center-Tour-72). *   [coming soon](https://sfrecpark.org/1671/EcoCenter-Programs-and-Events). *   [about the ecocenter](https://sfrecpark.org/1673/About-the-EcoCenter). 1.
